app.title: YourFocus
app.subtitle: Stay focused and healthy during your gaming sessions with smart break reminders

exercises.title: Break Exercises
exercises.subtitle: These exercises help prevent gaming fatigue and maintain your health during long sessions.

eyeRule.title: 20-20-20 Eye Rule
eyeRule.description: Look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds
eyeRule.instructions: Find a window or distant object and focus on it. This helps relax your eye muscles and prevent eye strain.

neckStretch.title: Neck Stretch
neckStretch.instructions: Slowly turn your head left, then right. Tilt your head to each shoulder. Hold each position for 5 seconds.

shoulderRolls.title: Shoulder Rolls
shoulderRolls.instructions: Roll your shoulders backward 5 times, then forward 5 times. Lift your shoulders to your ears and release.

wristStretch.title: Wrist Stretch
wristStretch.instructions: Extend your arm forward, palm up. Use your other hand to gently pull your fingers back. Hold for 15 seconds each hand.

exercises.greatJob: Great job! You've completed all exercises.

statistics.title: Your Focus Statistics
statistics.startFirstSession: Start your first session to unlock achievements!

notifications.breakCompleteBody: Time to get back to your game. Stay focused!
notifications.sessionCompleteBody: Time for a healthy break. Your eyes and body will thank you!

achievements.firstLaunchDesc: You've opened YourFocus for the first time
